column2: CompositeKey(Header): IF CustomerID = 9 THEN (CustomerId, RoastDate, Notes) ELSE (CustomerId, RoastDate)
Compute(Header): Target=OrderKey Expr=IIF(CustomerID = 9, CustomerID & '|' & RoastDate & '|' & Notes, CustomerID & '|' & RoastDate)
RecurringGrouping: HeaderBy=[CustomerID] LineBy=[ItemRequiredID, ItemPackagingID, ItemPrepTypeID] Aggs=[QtyRequired=SUM]
